meta.title: Dr. Preetha Nair, Aesthetic & Weight Loss Doctor in Kuala Lumpur | Nexus Clinic
meta.description: Meet Dr. Preetha Nair, aesthetic and weight loss doctor at Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur, offering Botox, dermal fillers, Sculptra, Profhilo, Rejuran and medical weight loss treatments.
meta.h1: Dr. Preetha Nair – Aesthetic & Weight Loss Doctor in Kuala Lumpur
meta.secondaryKeywords: aesthetic doctor Kuala Lumpur, weight loss doctor Kuala Lumpur, Botox doctor Kuala Lumpur, Sculptra doctor Kuala Lumpur, dermal filler doctor Kuala Lumpur, medical weight loss doctor KL

doctor.name: Dr. Preetha Nair
doctor.title: Aesthetic Medical Doctor | Advocate for Natural Beauty
doctor.bio: Dr. Preetha Nair is a skilled Aesthetic Medical Doctor based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. She believes in a holistic approach to aesthetic medicine, tailoring every treatment to suit individual needs. Her gentle techniques and attention to detail ensure patient comfort and satisfaction.
doctor.introduction: Dr. Preetha Nair is a skilled Aesthetic Medical Doctor based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. She believes in a holistic approach to aesthetic medicine, tailoring every treatment to suit individual needs. Her gentle techniques and attention to detail ensure patient comfort and satisfaction. She specializes in non-invasive treatments and personalized skincare solutions, with a focus on aesthetic medicine and weight loss management.

credentials.degreeFull: Doctor of Medicine (MD), Universitas Udayana, Indonesia

weightLossExpertise: Dr. Preetha Nair also focuses on personalized weight management programs, helping patients achieve sustainable body transformation through medical weight loss solutions, lifestyle guidance, and non-invasive body contouring treatments. Her approach includes GLP-1 based options such as Ozempic, Mounjaro, Wegovy, Saxenda, HCG, and CoolSculpting where suitable for each patient's unique needs.
professionalPhilosophy: Dr. Preetha believes aesthetic medicine should enhance natural beauty while preserving facial harmony and individuality.
patientApproach: Dr. Preetha takes a personalized and conservative approach to aesthetic medicine, focusing on treatment suitability, facial balance, patient comfort, and natural-looking results.

faq.q: Is Dr. Preetha experienced in injectable treatments?
faq.a: Yes. Dr. Preetha Nair performs injectable aesthetic treatments including Botox, dermal fillers, Sculptra, Profhilo and Rejuran, with a treatment approach focused on natural facial harmony, safety and patient suitability.

faq.q: Does Dr. Preetha perform Sculptra treatments?
faq.a: Yes. Dr. Preetha offers Sculptra collagen biostimulator treatment for suitable patients who want gradual collagen support, facial volume improvement and natural-looking rejuvenation.

faq.q: What weight loss treatments does Dr. Preetha offer?
faq.a: Dr. Preetha supports personalized weight management programs that may include medical weight loss consultation, lifestyle guidance, GLP-1 based options such as Ozempic, Mounjaro and Wegovy where suitable, Saxenda, HCG, and non-invasive body contouring options such as CoolSculpting.

faq.q: Which filler brands are used by Dr. Preetha?
faq.a: Filler brand selection is confirmed during consultation based on treatment area, facial anatomy, patient goals and product suitability.

faq.q: Is consultation available for anti-aging treatments?
faq.a: Yes. Patients can book a consultation with Dr. Preetha for anti-aging concerns including wrinkles, facial volume loss, skin laxity, dull skin, collagen loss and overall facial rejuvenation.
